name: TOOSII-XD ULTRA
description: A powerful WhatsApp bot with 255+ commands — AI, Games, Group Management, Media Tools, Anti-ViewOnce, Auto-reactions & more. Built with Baileys & Node.js.

SESSION_ID.description: Your session ID — get it FREE at: https://toosiitechdevelopertools.zone.id/session

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code, no + (e.g. 254712345678)

PREFIX.description: Bot command prefix (e.g. . or , or ! or /)

MODE.description: public = everyone can use | private = owner only

TIME_ZONE.description: Timezone for time commands (e.g. Africa/Nairobi, America/New_York, Asia/Kolkata)

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key — enables GPT-powered AI commands (optional)

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key — enables Gemini AI chatbot (optional)

WEATHER_API_KEY.description: OpenWeatherMap API key — enables weather command (optional, get free at openweathermap.org)

NEWSAPI_API_KEY.description: NewsAPI key — enables news commands (optional, get free at newsapi.org)

RAPIDAPI_API_KEY.description: RapidAPI key — enables extra media/search commands (optional)
